'''Cestus Cybernetics''' was a subsidiary of [[Baktoid Combat Automata/Legends|Baktoid Combat Automata]] located on the planet [[Ord Cestus/Legends|Ord Cestus]]. It was formed sometime after [[321 BBY]] when a dozen [[Cybot Galactica/Legends|Cybot Galactica]] officials, imprisoned in [[Cestus Penitentiary]] for a disaster on [[Etti IV/Legends|Etti IV]], formed a partnership with the prison staff. After the [[Trade Federation/Legends|Trade Federation's]] and [[Baktoid Combat Automata/Legends|Baktoid Combat Automata's]] defeat at the [[Battle of Naboo/Legends|Battle of Naboo]], the company fell on hard times. During the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] it introduced the [[JK-13 security droid]] as its best hope for survival. [[Clandes Industrial]] may have been a subsidiary.

After a plague swept the native [[X'Ting]], Cestus Cybernetics gained near-complete control of Ord Cestus.

By [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], Cestus Cybernetics was controlled by [[Five Families of Cestus Cybernetics|Five Families]]. These families were the true power behind the throne of Cestus, and attempted to drive Cestus into the [[Confederacy of Independent Systems/Legends|Confederacy of Independent Systems]] during the Clone Wars. The attempt was ultimately unsuccessful, and many representatives of the Five Families were killed when [[Advanced Recon Commando/Legends|ARC trooper]] [[Jangotat]] called down an orbital strike onto the Families' bunker. The remaining members of the Five Families accepted [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] rule.
